message: No documentation gaps found. The triggering push (commit 6b5457d by @azure-sdk / dependabot) bumps @azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-cli from 0.32.0 to 0.32.1 — modifying only eng/common/tsp-client/package.json and package-lock.json. This is an internal tooling dependency update with no user-facing SDK or API changes requiring documentation.
